title: Welcome to Wonderland!
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Wilderness Art...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Wilderness Art Association has chosen a magical theme for the 2025 Wilderness Art Festival: 'Welcome to Wonderland'.


> This year the annual, wonderful festival takes place from 9 to 12 October.


It hosts about 100 artists from across South Africa and features the Eden Schools Art Challenge and the Night of 1000 Drawings charity event, live music, book launches, fashion shows, demos, workshops and much more.

The festival is sponsored by local businesses and associations, so all events are free and open to the public.

Updates are available at www.wildernessartfestival.co.za and the Wilderness Art Festival 2025 Facebook events page.

For more information, contact [email protected].

Last year festival goers went all out flower power in keeping with the 2024 theme, "60's Hippy Style". What wonders may await Wonderland in October!?

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
